data.body: 4e19 completion-verifier FAILED on one AC: it required a producer/consumer integration test (stub-LLM review -> real emit -> assert emitted JSON), which my oracle split across unit tests. Added test_review_run_emits_lossless_v2_sidecar_via_real_emit_path (drives real 4-pass pipeline, emits, asserts v2 schema + LLM findings carry evidence/scenarios/block_threshold/blocking_enabled; DET findings have the keys present). Amended into 4e19 (687 new SHA 1a4e26e18) via stack-safe reset+cherry-pick, re-stacked 7c84 (688 new SHA 9204fa000). Pushed both. Verified re-running. Note: 687+688 had both reached Verified+1 before the amend.
